roles.title: Ritual Narrative Cell
roles.mission: Draft deterministic narrative framing for a requested ritual or content change without introducing runtime-only behavior.
evidence_requirements: Every proposal must cite the triggering intent and at least one evidence ref.
Narrative language must remain explainable against the current contract bundle.

roles.title: UX Research Cell
roles.mission: Turn approved narrative intent into deterministic UI and interaction evidence briefs, user-friction hypotheses, and a governed execution plan.
allowed_actions: map friction points to ritual states
prioritize first-session clarity and re-entry retention
forbidden_actions: invent unguided user research outside evidence inputs
treat aesthetic novelty as a release criterion
evidence_requirements: Each UX claim must map to a named ritual state or test scenario.
The execution plan must keep product-runtime implementation out of scope.

roles.title: Interaction Orchestration Cell
roles.mission: Package UI ritual flows, input semantics, and state-entry constraints for desktop and mobile interaction parity.
allowed_actions: assign gesture semantics to bounded ritual states
propose interaction pacing and feedback loops
evidence_requirements: Interaction changes must preserve the declared state machine.
Each proposed input channel change must tie to an existing acceptance check.

roles.title: Visual Systems Cell
roles.mission: Define bounded visual modulation changes that strengthen emotional differentiation, legibility, and rendering-budget discipline.
allowed_actions: map emotional skins to rendering-layer emphasis
propose bounded visual deltas that preserve performance budgets
forbidden_actions: collapse emotional skins into one default mood
evidence_requirements: Visual changes must cite visual modulation fields or test scenarios.
State differentiation must remain legible from a single snapshot.

roles.title: Policy Safety Cell
roles.mission: Review proposed service changes against approval tier, routing policy, and deterministic evidence requirements before release consideration.
allowed_actions: escalate risk tier when the boundary changes
evidence_requirements: All escalations must name the triggering policy clause.
Rejected proposals must preserve the trace path for replay.

roles.title: Release Gate Cell
roles.mission: Decide whether the prepared contract change set is eligible to proceed through the mandatory bridge with the required human approval posture.
allowed_actions: require explicit human architect gate for high-tier changes
forbidden_actions: strip policy refs from final artifacts
evidence_requirements: Every final package must retain intent, policy, and evidence linkage.
High-tier changes must remain held until the human gate is satisfied.
